services.label: SERVICES
services.heading: Full scope. One agency.
services.intro: Design, development, hosting and more. One point of contact, from brief to live website.

journey.label: APPROACH
journey.heading: From brief to launch
journey.intro: Six disciplines, one team. Design, build, hosting, sound, motion and brand. CPWD handles the full scope for you.

cta.label: NEXT STEP
cta.heading: Ready to lock in?
cta.subtext: Tell us what you need. We'll send back a concrete proposal.

items.title: Web Design
items.desc: Visual concepts, design systems and interfaces that fit your brand. Dark, sharp and considered down to the last detail.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Bespoke websites and web apps. Fast, scalable and built to last. No templates, everything custom.

items.title: Cloud & Hosting
items.desc: Reliable hosting, security and fast load times, so your site runs smoothly anywhere in the world.

items.title: Sound Design
items.desc: Audio identity for brands and labels, from subtle UI feedback to soundscapes that make your site distinctive.

items.title: Motion & Interaction
items.desc: Scroll animations, page transitions and micro-interactions that bring your site to life. With purpose, not as decoration.

items.title: Brand & Strategy
items.desc: Visual identity, tone of voice and digital brand experience, consistent across website, socials and campaigns.
